race.comment: BALGOWAN (9) was out of the money two runs back then again missed the frame last start over 1208m at Kyneton, beaten 2.25 lengths into fourth. Best figures measure up nicely, is a recent winner in this grade and the gun draw is a big plus. STEWART (6) is racing more consistently than most and while not really a factor last start, was beaten in a photo in this grade two back so only needs to return to that to go close. SLEEPING TIGER (4) showed little early speed last start and failed to come on in the straight when eighth, beaten 10 lengths, in a much tougher race than this. The two previous runs in this grade were a good pointer to his chances. SPINHOF (7) has been beaten similar margins his past three but draws ideally.
